checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Transcript of records with RLE for nurses, Med. Tech. & other paramedical position – 1 original and 1 photocopy
Certificate/ ID of membership in any organization – 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Professional Regulatory Commission or any other organization

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Residence certificate - current year – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Lipa City Treasurer’s Office or respective barangay halls

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certificate of work experience and training – 1 photocopy

checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office or Philippine Statistics Authority

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth Certificate of children, if any – 1 photocopy each
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office or Philippine Statistics Authority
Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office or Philippine Statistics Authority

steps.agency_action: 1. Receive the document. Check if there are available position.
2. Conduct initial interview. Instruct applicant to wait for further instruction via phone call, SMS or email. Enlist the applicant for Screening

internal_services.service_name: Request for Exit Clearance for Resigned, Retired or Terminated Employees
internal_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Exit Clearance for Resigned, Retired or Terminated

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Resignation Letter submitted 30 days prior date of termination

steps.agency_action: 2. Evaluate the 201 file for deficient document If 210 file have deficiency- Schedule the exit Interview once they comleted the required document If 201 file is complete- Proceed to Exit Interview

steps.client_steps: 3. Cooperate with the initial interview. Surrender the ID
steps.agency_action: 3. Conduct exit interview. Accomplish the Exit Interview Form Sign on the Exit Clearance Form Advice to proceed to Billing office of Business office Clearance

steps.client_steps: 4. Present the Exit Clearance Form Settle unpaid bill/ account at Billing Office, if there is any
steps.agency_action: 4. Check and process employees record for unsettled loans and bills. Sign on the Exit Clearance Form
